steps.code:
<?php
require_once('/wordpress/wp-load.php');

// Create sample upcoming parish events
$events = [
    [
        'title'    => 'Palm Sunday Mass',
        'content'  => 'Join us for the solemn blessing of palms and procession before the Mass of the Lord\'s Passion.',
        'date'     => date('Y-m-d', strtotime('+5 days')),
        'time'     => '09:00',
        'location' => 'Main Church'
    ],
    [
        'title'    => 'Stations of the Cross',
        'content'  => 'A prayerful walk through the fourteen stations, led by the parish youth group.',
        'date'     => date('Y-m-d', strtotime('+9 days')),
        'time'     => '17:30',
        'location' => 'Main Church'
    ],
    [
        'title'    => 'Easter Vigil',
        'content'  => 'The greatest night of the year. We welcome new members into the Church through Baptism and Confirmation.',
        'date'     => date('Y-m-d', strtotime('+13 days')),
        'time'     => '20:00',
        'location' => 'Main Church'
    ],
    [
        'title'    => 'Easter Sunday Mass',
        'content'  => 'Alleluia! Christ is risen. Join us for a joyful celebration of the Resurrection.',
        'date'     => date('Y-m-d', strtotime('+14 days')),
        'time'     => '09:00',
        'location' => 'Main Church'
    ],
    [
        'title'    => 'First Communion Preparation Morning',
        'content'  => 'Families of candidates are warmly invited.',
        'date'     => date('Y-m-d', strtotime('+28 days')),
        'time'     => '10:00',
        'location' => 'Parish Hall'
    ]
];

foreach ($events as $ev) {
    $id = wp_insert_post([
        'post_title'   => $ev['title'],
        'post_content' => $ev['content'],
        'post_status'  => 'publish',
        'post_type'    => 'parish_event'
    ]);
    if ($id && !is_wp_error($id)) {
        update_post_meta($id, '_plc_event_date',     $ev['date']);
        update_post_meta($id, '_plc_event_time',     $ev['time']);
        update_post_meta($id, '_plc_event_location', $ev['location']);
    }
}

// Create the home page containing the parish dashboard shortcode
$home_id = wp_insert_post([
    'post_title'   => 'Welcome to St John\'s',
    'post_name'    => 'home',
    'post_content' => '[parish_dashboard]',
    'post_status'  => 'publish',
    'post_type'    => 'page'
]);

if ($home_id && !is_wp_error($home_id)) {
    update_option('show_on_front', 'page');
    update_option('page_on_front', $home_id);
}

echo 'Setup complete.';
